record.field: Search the web and return a list of results with title, URL, and short description. This tool only lists relevant pages with limited information. You should always follow up with web_fetch on the most relevant URLs to get the actual page content before answering.
Fetch one or more web pages and extract their main readable content. Accepts a list of URLs and fetches them in parallel. Use this after web_search to read the full content of relevant pages.
